title: Default Result Updated Since 6 Months to Yes + Respect Explicit res6y=false

requirements.summary: Default the “Result Updated Since 6 Months” boolean input to true (Yes) on fresh load and on Reset.
acceptanceCriteria: When the app is opened with no query string, the "Result Updated Since 6 Months" radio group renders with "Yes" selected.
Any "Reset" action that restores DEFAULT_INPUTS restores this field to "Yes" selected.

file_operations.description: Update DEFAULT_INPUTS so resultUpdatedSince6Years is true by default, ensuring initial load with no URL parameters and Reset (which restores DEFAULT_INPUTS) select “Yes”.

requirements.summary: Fix URL query parsing/encoding so explicit res6y=false overrides the new default true while keeping parameter name res6y.
acceptanceCriteria: With `?res6y=false` in the URL (along with any other parameter that triggers parsing), the "Result Updated Since 6 Months" radio group renders with "No" selected.
With `?res6y=true` in the URL (along with any other parameter that triggers parsing), the radio group renders with "Yes" selected.
Shareable link generation continues to use the `res6y` parameter name and correctly encodes the current selection.

file_operations.description: Adjust parseInputsFromQuery logic for resultUpdatedSince6Years to: if the `res6y` param is present, parse strictly as true/false (so `res6y=false` is respected even when DEFAULT_INPUTS is true); otherwise fall back to DEFAULT_INPUTS. Keep encoding using the same `res6y` key and ensure links include `res6y=false` when the current value differs from the new default.
